name: Hominy Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the hominy, melted shortening, beaten eggs, and milk in a large bowl.
2. Gradually add the corn meal, salt, and baking powder to the mixture.
3. Stir until just combined; if desired, add an additional 1 tablespoon of milk for a softer texture.
4. Grease a 9-inch cast-iron skillet with shortening or oil.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 425°F (220°C) for 35 minutes, or until golden brown and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Serve warm. This recipe yields approximately 6 servings.
